---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new section, FAQ, or improvement to the support site
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
What question or task is hard to answer with the current site?

## Proposed Solution
What should we add or change? (new FAQ, new page, clearer copy, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Any references, screenshots, or additional information.
